database_tables.description: Stores customer profile data including their geographic region, email address, registration date, and status.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Unique email address of the customer.

columns.name: geographic_region
columns.description: Global region of the customer (e.g. 'US', 'EMEA', 'APAC'). Use this for geographic filters.

columns.name: registration_date
columns.description: Date customer registered in the system.

database_tables.description: Stores list of available products, their pricing, stock quantity, and category.

columns.name: price
columns.description: Unit selling price of the product.

database_tables.description: Stores individual transactions, invoice balances, transaction dates, and region codes.

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Primary structural identity index key for orders.

columns.name: order_date
columns.description: Timestamp when the order was placed.

columns.name: geographic_region
columns.description: Global distribution territory value for the order (e.g., 'US', 'EMEA', 'APAC'). Use this for order region filtering.

columns.name: total_amount
columns.description: Net transactional value calculated for the completed order processing.

database_tables.description: Stores line-item details for each order, linking products and quantities.

columns.name: order_item_id
columns.description: Primary key for order line items.

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Price per unit at the time of purchase.

database_tables.description: Stores customer product reviews and numerical rating scores (1-5 scale).

columns.name: review_id
columns.description: Primary key index for product reviews.

columns.name: review_text
columns.description: Text content of the customer's review comment.
